calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Solomon Isaac. Mercy Hall for Creditor Myers Urbatsch.

Mr. Der stated that the Executor has not addressed the Creditor's Claim, and that he explained to Ms. Hall that the fees were for services in the Temprorary Conservatorship and that the Court needs to approve them. Ms. Hall stated that she e mailed copies of the petition to the Family in Israel and referred to the attachments (spread sheets) to petition that list services provided. The Petition for Attorney's Fees was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos.

Petition For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
